session_labels.description: Roadside farm stall and biltong shop provisioning stop.
Travel-stop shopping with one lodge arrival shot.
Lodge interior, pool, and outdoor breakfast arrival.
Male lions feeding on kill in bushveld.
Lion resting in dry grass on game drive.
Sundowner drinks on safari vehicle plus lion sightings.
Lions resting plus sunset savanna portrait.
Early game drive: rhino, elephant, bush coffee, golden hour.
Elephant herd on dirt track.
Bush coffee and snack stop on safari vehicle.
Sun loungers on wooden deck outside lodge villa.
Outdoor bush cabana with rose wine and snacks.
Tent exteriors and pool-deck iced coffee lounging.
Reserve main gate disinfection checkpoint.
Rhino sightings from game-drive vehicle at golden hour.
Cheetah encounter on bush roads near main gate.
Buffet pasta service in lodge dining.
Buffet pasta in chafing dish.
Lodge deck at dusk with coffee overlooking savanna.
Dawn lodge-deck portraits with savanna horizon.
Bush coffee stop and open safari vehicle in bushveld.
Full lodge breakfast in thatched dining room.
Lodge restaurant breakfast service.
Deck wine tasting with white tablecloths overlooking bush.
Wildlife viewing from lodge deck and beanbag balcony.
Golden-hour deck dining with wine decanters.
Rhino and calf on track during golden-hour drive.
Elephant encounter and sunset bush road portraits.
Sunset savanna portrait on dirt track.
Savanna sunset landscape silhouettes.
Savanna sunset golden horizon.
Lodge breakfast brunch and lodge grounds wildlife.
Crocodile on track and night safari drive.
Safari tent exteriors and savanna landscape.
BTS scouting: tent, wine cellar, art, depot.
DJI aerial shots of decks, dining, and lodge grounds.

notes: Buckets assigned via visual review of session sample thumbnails.
Wine 1 = deck/savanna tastings. Wine 2 = cabana/pool area.
Wildlife and drone footage placed in general.
